Hi, I'm Raghu Varma

|

Passionate about Machine Learning, Data Analysis, and Problem Solving — building intelligent systems that create real-world impact.

Contact Me
— About Me

Builder Mindset, Student Heart

I'm a CS (AI & ML) undergrad at LPU who started coding out of curiosity — and never stopped. Fast forward: still curious, way more obsessed with making things actually work.

I build across the stack — from ML pipelines in PyTorch to desktop apps in Java Swing. I care about code that does something real, not code that just sits in a repo looking pretty. Understanding the problem comes first, the keyboard comes second.

The best part? Watching something you built — an alert system, a face recognizer, a smarter CV screener — actually work in the real world. That feeling never gets old.

Outside the screen: kitchen experiments (hit or miss 😂), long evening walks, and weekend hangouts with friends. Balance keeps the brain sharp.

"Clean data beats clever algorithms. Every time."
"The best model is the one that actually solves the problem."
"First make it work. Then make it fast. Then make it beautiful."

What I Actually Enjoy Building

Not everything. Just the stuff that keeps me hooked.

🧠
Systems That Think

ML models, NLP pipelines, computer vision — anything that takes raw messy data and turns it into something useful. Building intelligence into software is genuinely exciting to me.

📊
Data That Tells a Story

A good dashboard or visualization shouldn't need a manual. I enjoy making data obvious — real-time monitoring, clean charts, alerts that fire when they should and shut up when they shouldn't.

🔧
Tools People Actually Use

Whether it's a Streamlit app or a Java desktop tool, I like building things that make someone's workflow better. If it saves time or removes pain, it's worth building.

— Portfolio

Featured Projects

A curated snapshot of recent work spanning machine learning, data analysis, and full-stack development. Each project showcases real-world problem solving with production-ready code.

Air & Water Quality
Project 01
Air & Water Quality Monitoring

Built a real-time monitoring system to analyze environmental data and compute AQI/WQI for pollution assessment. Developed an interactive Streamlit dashboard for visualization and real-time insights.

Python OpenCVMLStreamlit
✓ 94% Accuracy GitHub
Face Recognition
Project 02
Face Recognition System

Real-time face recognition using OpenCV and deep learning for detecting and identifying faces from images and video streams. Implemented preprocessing, feature extraction, and model-based classification.

Python OpenCVDeep Learning
✓ 85% Accuracy GitHub
Report Generator
Project 03
Student Report Card Generator

Desktop application to automate report card generation using OOP — including grading logic, validation, and percentage calculation. File handling for persistent records with Java Swing UI.

Java Swing UIOOPJDBC
💻 Desktop App GitHub
Resume Analyzer
Project 04
Resume Analyzer & Assistance

Intelligent Resume Analyzer using NLP and ML to automate resume screening and candidate profiling. Performs information extraction, keyword matching, and semantic similarity analysis against job descriptions. Provides personalized feedback, identifies missing skills, and improves ATS compatibility.

Python NLP ML ATS Text Processing
🧠 AI-Powered GitHub
